scripts.build:og: magick -background none -density 300 public/og-image.svg -resize 1200x630 PNG32:public/og-image.png && magick -background none -density 300 public/og-image.svg -resize 1200x630 -quality 95 public/og-image.jpg
scripts.build:pages: npm run build:og && VITE_BASE_PATH=/Davetiye/ npm run build
scripts.deploy: npm run build:pages && gh-pages -d dist -b gh-pages -t true
